data.title: Tokenize Political Club house color + house-token sync check

data.body: Political Club (houses.ts id 'forum') is a real house intentionally hidden from launch, but it's missing from index.css @theme (only 10 of 12 house tokens defined), so PoliticalClubPage hardcodes its hex (#C83858/#6E1830) instead of using tokens/vars like sibling house pages. Fix: add the 2 @theme tokens (mirroring houses.ts palette), repoint the page to tokens/vars + match the Education/LiberalArts inverted-house pattern (deep bg, light accent), and add a drift-check test asserting houses.ts palettes === @theme house tokens (houses.ts must stay real hex — HouseBanner does luminance math on it; @theme is the derived mirror). Document PC as a real-but-hidden house. People/Story (non-house section colors) are a scoped follow-up. Deferred note: PC stays out of initial launch but may render later.

Cold review (independent sub-agent, fresh context) vs plan acceptance: PASS, zero findings. Verified: 2 new @theme tokens match houses.ts forum palette exactly (#C83858/#6E1830); houses.ts unchanged (canonical hex preserved); all 12 house tokens present. PoliticalClubPage repointed — grep for #C83858/#6E1830/text-white = 0 matches; mirrors LiberalArtsPage inverted-house pattern; visually equivalent (token values == old inline hex). Sync test is NON-vacuous — reviewer mutation-tested it (changed political-club-deep to #6E1831 → 1 failed/13 passed, restored): catches single-digit drift across all 12 tokens + orphan detection. Gates: typecheck/build/conformance pass; tests 7 failed/155 passed — the 7 are exactly FRAC-199's pre-existing set, sync test passes 14/14, no new failures. DESIGN.md note accurate; 12-token table now backed by code. Baseline correctly unchanged (removing raw hex can't add net-new). Move to done.
